<!-- GENERATED by tools/build-component-index.js — DO NOT EDIT. Re-run instead. -->
# Waldo DS — Component Index

**Read this BEFORE deciding a component or chart is missing.** Everything below already
exists. Scan all three sections — a comp-only glance misses the charts and Brand API
patterns. `use_when` is joined in from `usage-doctrine.yaml`. Machine-readable copy: `component-index.json`.

## Components (60)

- **Accordion** `#comp-accordion` — use when: FAQ-style breakdowns in a report (methodology, data sources, limitations as stacked sections) · Grouping insight categories where users scan headers and expand one at a time (type="single" collapsible) · Settings pages with multiple bordered sections sharing identical trigger styling
- **Alert** `#comp-alert` — use when: Inline feedback within a page (form errors, plan limits, info) · Persistent contextual messages that live in the content
- **Alert Dialog** `#comp-alert-dialog` — use when: Confirming deletion of a space, feed, or saved report where data loss is irreversible · Confirming a destructive bulk action on signals (e.g. dismiss all, purge feed items) · Interrupting the user before an action that consumes credits or triggers an external send
- **Aspect Ratio** `#comp-aspect-ratio` — use when: Locking media in signal cards to a consistent ratio (post thumbnails, ad creatives at 16/9 or 1/1) · Embedded video or chart previews in reports that must keep proportions across responsive grids
- **Avatar** `#comp-avatar` — use when: Representing a person (round shape) · Representing a brand/company/logo (square shape) · Member lists, author attribution, team displays
- **Badge** `#comp-badge` — use when: Status labels (Active, Paused, Error, Draft) · Counts and metadata tags · Category labels on cards
- **Breadcrumb** `#comp-breadcrumb` — use when: Showing location depth inside a space hierarchy (Space > Feed > Signal detail) · Report drill-downs where users navigate back up the path · Long paths that need truncation — BreadcrumbEllipsis collapses middle ancestors
- **Button** `#comp-button` — use when: Primary action in a view (one per screen max for default variant) · Form submission, dialog confirmation, CTA
- **Calendar** `#comp-calendar` — use when: Picking a custom date range for a signals or mentions feed (range selection inside a Popover) · Scheduling a report delivery date or a space digest start date · Filtering insights by a specific day or week in a brand timeline view
- **Card** `#comp-card` — use when: Grouping a self-contained insight or report summary on a dashboard, with title, description, and an action in the header · Presenting a signal feed's stat block (mention counts, sentiment deltas) as a bounded surface · Wrapping a space overview tile (brand logo, latest activity, quick actions) in a grid of spaces
- **Carousel** `#comp-carousel` — use when: Swiping through ad creatives or post media attached to a single signal · Browsing a horizontal strip of featured insight cards on a space home · Stepping through report cover previews in a gallery
- **Checkbox** `#comp-checkbox` — use when: Multi-select from a list · Boolean toggle that needs a label · Settings that apply independently
- **Collapsible** `#comp-collapsible` — use when: Show/hide of a single optional region (expanding a truncated transcript, "see all 12 sources") · Collapsible sub-groups inside the Sidebar (pairs with SidebarMenuSub) · One-off "more details" toggles where multiple regions may be open simultaneously
- **Combobox** `#comp-combobox` — use when: Typeahead brand picker when adding brands to track in a space · Selecting a feed or report destination from a long list while typing to filter · Tag/topic input on insights where options are fetched or numerous
- **Command** `#comp-command` — use when: Global command palette (Cmd+K) to jump between spaces, feeds, and reports · Searchable action list inside a Popover (e.g. assign signal to feed from many options) · Filterable multi-group pickers — brands, sources, report templates — with keyboard navigation
- **Context Menu** `#comp-context-menu` — use when: Right-click actions on a signal card in a feed (pin, mute brand, copy link, add to report) · Right-click on a space or feed in the sidebar tree (rename, duplicate, archive) · Power-user shortcuts on report blocks or insight rows without adding visible chrome
- **Data Table** `#comp-data-table` — use when: Displaying a list of brands, mentions, or campaigns where the user needs to sort, filter, or paginate · Any tabular data set with more than ~15 rows where filtering by a column is useful · Tables that need column-visibility toggling (e.g. dashboard config views)
- **Date Picker** `#comp-date-picker` — use when: Selecting a single date for scheduling (report delivery, digest start date, export date) · Selecting a date range for filtering signals, mentions, or brand timeline data
- **Dialog** `#comp-dialog` — use when: Actions that need focus and shouldn't navigate away · Forms, confirmations, sharing, configuration
- **Drawer** `#comp-drawer` — use when: Mobile bottom-sheet for signal quick actions or filter controls with swipe-to-dismiss · Touch-friendly detail view of a feed item on small viewports · Progressive disclosure of report options on mobile where a centered Dialog feels cramped
- **Empty State** `#comp-empty-state` — use when: Page, section, or inline area with no data yet · After filtering returns zero results
- **File Input** `#comp-file-input` — use when: File upload with drag-and-drop zone inside dialogs or forms · Showing uploaded file list with remove action
- **Filter Chip** `#comp-filter-chip` — use when: Filter bars above signal or mention feeds — an on/off facet like "Favourites" (icon + active + onClick) · Dropdown-style filters in the same row (PopoverTrigger asChild with showChevron) · Quick toggling of feed scopes (paid ads / owned media / news) where chips sit side by side
- **Filter Trigger** `#comp-filter-trigger` — use when: Inline filter selector inside a filter panel or search header (bare label + chevron, opens a dropdown) · Anywhere a filter has a label + optional current value displayed inline · Insights panel filter rows (Saved searches, Recent, Any source, etc.)
- **Form** `#comp-form`
- **Hover Card** `#comp-hover-card` — use when: Previewing a brand profile (logo, follower counts, recent signals) when hovering a brand mention · Peeking at a creator or author card from a byline in a signals feed · Showing a report or space summary on hover over a link, without navigating
- **Icon** `#comp-icon` — use when: Filter action buttons (paired with btn-secondary or btn-ghost) · Any UI that triggers a filter panel or filter state
- **Input** `#comp-input` — use when: Single-line text entry · Search, email, URL, name fields
- **Input OTP** `#comp-input-otp` — use when: Email or 2FA verification codes during sign-in · Confirming a destructive action with a short emailed code · Entering a short invite or pairing code when joining a team space
- **Kbd** `#comp-kbd` — use when: Showing the shortcut next to a command in the command palette · Hinting shortcuts inside Tooltip content on toolbar actions · Documenting keyboard navigation in empty states or onboarding hints
- **Label** `#comp-label` — use when: Naming form fields in space settings, feed configuration, or report setup dialogs · Pairing with Checkbox/Switch/RadioGroup rows (e.g. notification toggles per signal type) · Labeling Select or Input controls in filter and creation forms
- **List Item** `#comp-list-item` — use when: Rows in a list (people, brands, entities) with avatar + label + actions · Any interactive row that isn't a table
- **Loader** `#comp-loader` — use when: DotsLoader for async waits — feed refreshing, signals being fetched, report list loading · ShimmerText for AI generation in progress ("Analyzing signals…", agent thinking states) · TextCursor appended to streaming AI text as it types out an insight
- **Menubar** `#comp-menubar` — use when: Persistent app-level menu row in a desktop-style editor surface (e.g. report builder: File, Insert, View) · Grouped command sets with keyboard shortcuts always visible at the top of a workspace canvas
- **Nav Item** `#comp-nav-item` — use when: Navigation between views, sections, or settings pages · Sidebar panels (Signals, Settings, Report Builder, Insights) · Settings panel items (label + trailing icon) · Signal/feed sidebar items (count badge + label) · Report builder items (label + status indicator) · Any navigable list item that is NOT a row of data
- **Navigation Menu** `#comp-navigation-menu` — use when: A horizontal top-bar menu where items expand into rich dropdown panels with descriptions per link · Grouped link panels on marketing or settings surfaces
- **Pagination** `#comp-pagination` — use when: Paging through bounded, countable result sets (archived reports, signal search results with known totals) · Tables of mentions where users need to jump to a specific page
- **Popover** `#comp-popover` — use when: Date-range picker for filtering signals or report periods, anchored to a filter button · Inline settings panel for a feed widget (refresh cadence, sources) without leaving the page · Small anchored forms like "add tag to insight" or share-link options
- **Progress** `#comp-progress` — use when: Showing a bulk import or backfill of signals with a known percentage · Report generation steps where completion is measurable · Quota usage bars (e.g. monthly credits consumed) in workspace settings
- **Radio Group** `#comp-radio-group` — use when: Mutually exclusive options where user must pick exactly one · Settings choices (e.g. "Share only / Comment / Full access")
- **Resizable** `#comp-resizable` — use when: Split workspace views (signal feed list left, signal detail or insight editor right, user-adjustable) · Report builder layouts where users balance an outline panel against a preview pane
- **Scroll Area** `#comp-scroll-area` — use when: A fixed-height signal feed column that scrolls independently of the page · Long filter or space lists inside popovers, dialogs, or sidebar panels that must not grow the container · Horizontal strips of report cards or media thumbnails (ScrollBar orientation="horizontal")
- **Segmented Control** `#comp-segmented-control` — use when: 2–4 mutually exclusive view modes or toggles (Everyone/Only selected, Day/Week/Month) · Inside dialog body to switch between modes or filter scope · Primary page-level navigation with many items (variant="surface")
- **Select** `#comp-select` — use when: Choosing one option from a known list (5+ options) · Filter controls
- **Separator** `#comp-separator` — use when: Grouping related items in menus, dropdowns, settings panels · Visual division between sections
- **Sheet** `#comp-sheet` — use when: Signal detail panel sliding in from the right while keeping the feed visible behind the overlay · Editing a space's configuration (sources, brands tracked) in a side panel · Report block inspector or insight annotation panel on desktop
- **Sidebar** `#comp-sidebar` — use when: The app shell's primary navigation with grouped menus and an active-route indicator · Persistent workspace switcher plus per-space navigation that survives route changes and collapses to icons · Mobile navigation that should automatically become an off-canvas Sheet drawer
- **Skeleton** `#comp-skeleton` — use when: Placeholder rows while a signals feed or mentions list fetches · Ghosting a report card grid or space sidebar during initial load · Reserving the shape of an insight summary block before data arrives
- **Slider** `#comp-slider` — use when: Continuous value selection (volume, opacity, price range) · Range selection with two thumbs
- **Sonner** `#comp-sonner`
- **Status Spinner** `#comp-status-spinner` — use when: File upload row status · Any async operation that resolves to success/error/warning
- **Switch** `#comp-switch` — use when: Immediate on/off toggle (takes effect instantly without Save) · Feature flags, notification settings, per-item enable/disable
- **Table** `#comp-table` — use when: Structured data with multiple columns and rows · Sortable, filterable data sets
- **Tabs** `#comp-tabs` — use when: Navigation between distinct sections of a page · Switching between related views (text variant for page nav, pill for inline filters, pill-primary for main page navigation)
- **Tag** `#comp-tag` — use when: User-entered removable labels (emails, keywords, filters) · Multi-value inputs where items can be added and removed
- **Toast** `#comp-toast` — use when: Ephemeral feedback after user actions (saved, uploaded, error) · System alerts that appear in the corner and auto-dismiss
- **Toggle** `#comp-toggle` — use when: Icon-only formatting or view affordances in an editor toolbar (e.g. bold in a report editor) · A standalone on/off tool state in a toolbar, like snapping or compact density
- **Toggle Group** `#comp-toggle-group` — use when: Multi-select formatting clusters in an editor toolbar (bold/italic/underline together) · Toolbar single-choice icon sets, e.g. chart type (line/bar/area) on an insight visualization
- **Tooltip** `#comp-tooltip` — use when: Explaining icon-only buttons · Showing keyboard shortcuts · Non-essential supplementary info
- **Wizard Dialog** `#comp-wizard-dialog` — use when: Multi-step onboarding flows · Setup flows that need contextual images/previews on the right

## Brand API components (21)

Dashboard-specific patterns for Brand API prototypes — not core atoms.

- **Ad Copy Card** `#comp-ad-copy-card` — use when: Displaying ad creative copy (headline, body, CTA) in a card · Competitive ad teardown / creative review surfaces
- **Alert List Row** `#comp-alert-list-row` — use when: One row in an alerts / signals list (icon, message, timestamp) · Feed of system or brand alerts
- **Article Card** `#comp-article-card` — use when: Displaying a press or news item mentioning a brand (media monitoring feeds) · Showing earned media coverage with source, headline, and snippet
- **Bar Track** `#comp-bar-track` — use when: Ranked list of brands/entities by a single metric (SoV, reach, engagement) · Simple percentage breakdown without a reference point
- **Benchmark Bar** `#comp-benchmark-bar` — use when: Showing brand performance vs a reference point (category median, benchmark, competitor average) · Comparing multiple metrics in a stacked layout (sentiment, SoV, engagement, etc.)
- **Brand Column** `#comp-brand-column` — use when: Competitive overview grid showing brand share with supporting insight text · Height-encoded comparison of 3-5 brands where taller = higher share/metric
- **Code Block** `#comp-code-block` — use when: Displaying preformatted code, CLI commands, or prompt text the user may need to copy · Showing multi-action copy options (e.g. "Copy prompt" + "Copy Curl") over the same content block
- **Comment Card** `#comp-comment-card` — use when: Displaying a social mention (Reddit, X, TikTok, Instagram, etc.) · Feed of brand mentions with platform, author, sentiment, and text
- **Copy Link** `#comp-copy-link` — use when: Displaying a shareable URL the user should copy (invite link, share link, public URL) · Inside dialog bodies where a link needs to be copied with one click
- **Depth Pill** `#comp-depth-pill` — use when: Compact inline indicator of a depth/intensity score · Annotating an item with a small quantified badge
- **Drill Panel** `#comp-drill-panel` — use when: Dashboard drill-down detail on a metric, chart point, or list row (right slide-in) · Contextual detail that should not navigate away from the dashboard
- **Dual-Bar Row** `#comp-dual-bar-row` — use when: Comparing the same metric between two brands/entities side by side (e.g. Nike 68% vs Adidas 52%) · Competitive snapshot rows inside a card or list
- **KPI Stat Card** `#comp-kpi-stat-card` — use when: Headline metric on a dashboard (big number + label + trend delta) · Summarizing a single KPI with period-over-period change
- **Leaderboard Row** `#comp-leaderboard-row` — use when: Any ranked list — rank + entity + a right-hand value, one item per row · Comparing entities ordered by a metric (magnitude OR trend/momentum) · Trending items per source (hashtags, topics, subreddits) — use the trend variant + .lb-head · Multi-source comparison — one .lb column per source, composed side by side
- **Live Badge** `#comp-live-badge` — use when: Indicating a real-time / live state on a surface · Marking streaming or actively-updating data
- **Media Tile** `#comp-media-tile` — use when: Displaying a social post thumbnail in a grid (image or video) · Ad creative previews in a compact grid layout · Brand owned/earned media feed grids
- **Quote Card** `#comp-quote-card` — use when: Displaying a Voice-of-Customer cluster (verbatim quote + frequency) · Showing what audiences love or pain about a brand
- **Recommendation Card** `#comp-recommendation-card` — use when: Surfacing an AI-generated strategic recommendation (comms, product, campaign, etc.) · Presenting actionable insights with supporting evidence quotes in a feed or panel
- **Score Ring** `#comp-score-ring` — use when: Showing a single 0–100 score (reputation, resonance, presence, health) where the value sits within a good/watch/at-risk range · Presenting one headline metric prominently (hero variant) or a small grid of scores (input variant) · The zone (how good/bad the number is) matters as much as the number itself
- **Theme Pill** `#comp-theme-pill`
- **Waldo Logo** `#comp-waldo-logo` — use when: Displaying the Waldo wordmark in topbars, splash screens, or branded surfaces

## Charts / Data-viz (16)

- **Area Charts** `#chart-page-area`
- **Bar Charts** `#chart-page-bar`
- **Line Charts** `#chart-page-line`
- **Pie Charts** `#chart-page-pie`
- **Radar Charts** `#chart-page-radar`
- **Radial Charts** `#chart-page-radial`
- **Chart Tooltip** `#chart-page-tooltip` — use when: Plotting signal volume over time for a brand or competitor feed · Visualizing sentiment or share-of-voice breakdowns inside a report · Rendering trend lines for audience or category insights in a dashboard card
- **Chart Palette** `#chart-page-palette` — use when: Plotting signal volume over time for a brand or competitor feed · Visualizing sentiment or share-of-voice breakdowns inside a report · Rendering trend lines for audience or category insights in a dashboard card
- **Donut Chart** `#chart-page-donut`
- **Horizontal Bar** `#chart-page-hbar`
- **Proportion Bar** `#chart-page-proportion`
- **Trend Line** `#chart-page-trend`
- **Sparkline** `#chart-page-sparkline`
- **Gantt** `#chart-page-gantt`
- **Segmented Bar** `#chart-page-segbar` — use when: Showing proportional distribution of topics, themes, or categories across a brand's content · Comparing message mix between two brands side by side (one bar per brand) · Sentiment breakdown where each segment's share matters visually
- **Column Cards** `#chart-page-column-card` — use when: Week-over-week or period comparison of engagement metrics (posts, interactions, delta %) · When the magnitude of each period should be visually encoded by card height
